'''âz-ch-ng''' ('''kazachang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pod|pod]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pod|pod]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-ch-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kazachang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizachang|thizachang]] || [[word:jizachang|jizachang]] || [[word:shizachang|shizachang]] || [[word:kizachang|kizachang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzachang|thuthuzachang]] || [[word:jujuzachang|jujuzachang]] || [[word:shushuzachang|shushuzachang]] || [[word:kukuzachang|kukuzachang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzachang|thuzachang]] || [[word:juzachang|juzachang]] || [[word:shuzachang|shuzachang]] || [[word:kuzachang|kuzachang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzachang|thuzachang]] || [[word:juzachang|juzachang]] || [[word:shuzachang|shuzachang]] || [[word:kuzachang|kuzachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezachang|thezachang]] || [[word:jezachang|jezachang]] || [[word:shezachang|shezachang]] || [[word:kezachang|kezachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozachang|thothozachang]] || [[word:jojozachang|jojozachang]] || [[word:shoshozachang|shoshozachang]] || [[word:kokozachang|kokozachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozachang|thozachang]] || [[word:jozachang|jozachang]] || [[word:shozachang|shozachang]] || [[word:kozachang|kozachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozachang|thozachang]] || [[word:jozachang|jozachang]] || [[word:shozachang|shozachang]] || [[word:kozachang|kozachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzachang|thĂŠzachang]] || [[word:jĂŠzachang|jĂŠzachang]] || [[word:shĂŠzachang|shĂŠzachang]] || [[word:kĂŠzachang|kĂŠzachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazachang|thathazachang]] || [[word:jajazachang|jajazachang]] || [[word:shashazachang|shashazachang]] || [[word:kakazachang|kakazachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazachang|thazachang]] || [[word:jazachang|jazachang]] || [[word:shazachang|shazachang]] || [[word:kazachang|kazachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazachang|thazachang]] || [[word:jazachang|jazachang]] || [[word:shazachang|shazachang]] || [[word:kazachang|kazachang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazachang|shazachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazachang|goshazachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazachang|gokishazachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazachangnĂŒ|shazachangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazachangnknĂŒ|goshazachangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazachangnĂŒ|gokishazachangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazachangshĂ«|shazachangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazachangnkshĂ«|goshazachangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazachangshĂ«|gokishazachangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazachangro|shazachangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazachangnkro|goshazachangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazachangro|gokishazachangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazachangmu|shazachangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazachangnkmu|goshazachangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazachangmu|gokishazachangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazachangsher|shazachangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazachangnksher|goshazachangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazachangsher|gokishazachangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazachang|shazachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazachangnkng|goshazachangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazachang|gokishazachang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazachangya|shazachangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazachangnkya|goshazachangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazachangya|gokishazachangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazachangyam|shazachangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazachangnkyam|goshazachangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazachangyam|gokishazachangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazachangnĂŒshĂ«|shazachangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazachangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazachangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazachangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazachangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazachangnĂŒro|shazachangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazachangnknĂŒro|goshazachangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazachangnĂŒro|gokishazachangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazachangnĂŒmu|shazachangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazachangnknĂŒmu|goshazachangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazachangnĂŒmu|gokishazachangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazachangshĂ«nĂŒ|shazachangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazachangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazachangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazachangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazachangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazachangshĂ«ro|shazachangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazachangnkshĂ«ro|goshazachangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazachangshĂ«ro|gokishazachangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazachangshĂ«mu|shazachangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazachangnkshĂ«mu|goshazachangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazachangshĂ«mu|gokishazachangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazachangronĂŒ|shazachangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazachangnkronĂŒ|goshazachangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazachangronĂŒ|gokishazachangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazachangroshĂ«|shazachangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazachangnkroshĂ«|goshazachangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazachangroshĂ«|gokishazachangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazachangromu|shazachangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazachangnkromu|goshazachangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazachangromu|gokishazachangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazachangmunĂŒ|shazachangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazachangnkmunĂŒ|goshazachangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazachangmunĂŒ|gokishazachangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazachangmushĂ«|shazachangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazachangnkmushĂ«|goshazachangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazachangmushĂ«|gokishazachangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazachangmuro|shazachangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazachangnkmuro|goshazachangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazachangmuro|gokishazachangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
